source_jobs.title: AMS Innovation and Improvement Manager
AWS Public Cloud Senior Consultant
Azure Public Cloud Senior Consultant
Chief of Staff, Cloud & Infrastructure
Cloud Security Engineer
source_jobs.description: <p>DevSecOps Engineer<br>About the Role<br>We are looking for a hands-on DevSecOps Engineer to own our end-to-end vulnerability management<br>process and drive security across our cloud-native platform. This is a technical, ownership-heavy role<br>sitting at the intersection of security engineering and platform engineering.<br>You will be responsible for identifying, triaging, remediating, and reporting on vulnerabilities across our<br>application stack, container images, and cloud infrastructure. You will work closely with our Compliance<br>Manager to ensure our security posture meets compliance requirements and that risk is understood,<br>documented, and managed appropriately.<br>This is not a monitoring-only role. We expect you to roll up your sleeves, open pull requests, fix Dockerfiles,<br>bump package versions, modify CI/CD pipelines, and own the fix through to deployment and verification.<br>What You Will Be Doing<br>Vulnerability Management<br>• Own the end-to-end vulnerability management lifecycle — discovery, triage, prioritisation, remediation<br>tracking, and closure<br>• Manage and maintain the vulnerability backlog, ensuring SLAs are tracked and met<br>• Triage findings from automated scanning tools and apply contextual risk judgement — not every critical<br>CVE is equally critical in every context<br>• Produce regular vulnerability reports and risk dashboards for internal stakeholders and the<br>Compliance Manager<br>• Document risk acceptance decisions, mitigating controls, and remediation timelines<br>Vulnerability Remediation<br>• Remediate vulnerabilities directly — bumping dependency versions in package manifests (npm, pip,<br>Maven, Go modules etc.), updating base images, fixing misconfigurations<br>• Update and harden Dockerfiles — base image selection, multi-stage builds, non-root users, minimal<br>attack surface<br>• Work within our Git-based workflow — raise PRs, participate in code review, deploy and verify your own<br>fixes end to end<br>1<br>Container &amp; Application Security<br>• Integrate and maintain container image scanning in CI/CD pipelines (Trivy, Snyk, Grype or equivalent)<br>• Integrate Software Composition Analysis (SCA) and Static Application Security Testing (SAST) tooling into<br>pipelines<br>• Define and enforce quality gates that prevent vulnerable or non-compliant images from reaching<br>production<br>• Identify vulnerable third-party dependencies and work through remediation with engineering teams<br>Kubernetes &amp; AWS EKS Security<br>• Harden and maintain the security configuration of our AWS EKS clusters<br>• Implement and maintain Kubernetes RBAC, Pod Security Standards, Network Policies, and admission<br>controls<br>• Manage secrets securely — AWS Secrets Manager, External Secrets Operator, or equivalent<br>• Ensure IAM roles for service accounts (IRSA) are correctly scoped and maintained<br>• Monitor and respond to runtime security events using tooling such as Falco<br>Cloud Infrastructure Security<br>• Maintain and improve AWS security posture across the platform<br>• Work with AWS-native security tooling — Security Hub, GuardDuty, Inspector, IAM Access Analyzer<br>• Identify and remediate misconfigurations in Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, Helm)<br>• Apply least-privilege principles consistently across IAM, service accounts, and workload identities<br>CI/CD Pipeline Security<br>• Own and evolve the security gates within our CI/CD pipelines<br>• Implement automated scanning for containers, dependencies, IaC, and secrets<br>• Ensure pipelines enforce policy as code — fail fast on critical findings<br>• Be comfortable modifying pipeline configuration

Director - Application Migration/integration
source_jobs.description: <p>Ensono’s Business Transformation Architects are business and technology advisors who challenge the status quo to drive<br>innovation and transformation within the enterprise space. They work closely with our Clients to understand their business<br>drivers and objectives to induce significant change and continuous improvement. They are responsible for aligning the strategic<br>business requirements of the Client with the knowledge and capabilities of Ensono, and lead the effort to execute multi-year<br>transformation initiatives.<br>Business Transformation Architects collaborate with various internal stakeholders to coordinate Architecture, Features<br>functions, Migration and planning governance for our Clients. They work with the Client’s business and technical teams to<br>create reference architecture frameworks, templates, and Target State Architecture designs. Ensono's Business Transformation<br>Architects also provide Client and industry feedback to our internal teams to build and plan our product and technology<br>roadmaps.<br>The successful person in this role will be effective in fostering executive level relationships with an emphasis on Client<br>satisfaction while owning the overall operational solution, migration and planning governance.<br>Responsibilities:<br>• Engage closely with C-level and Client Transformation executives to lead enterprise-wide transformation and<br>migration program(s)<br>• Identify business drivers, goals and develop compelling board ready proposals and value-driven business cases to<br>achieve desired business outcomes<br>• Collaborate with cross-functional technology experts to drive architectural planning, execution plans and roadmaps to<br>accelerate our Client’s business, transformation and migration outcome<br>• Manage transitions of responsibility with Clients in the case of various scenarios such as colocation transitions or<br>public cloud instances, and ensure steady state consistency<br>o This could include assimilating complex and diverse personnel and operational responsibility as well as<br>managing changing or competing demands and priorities.<br>• Drive and collaborate with counterparts within Internal teams (Consulting organizations, Product Engineering,<br>Implementation Engineering and Program Management) and the Client Technology leads to create solution and<br>strategies for transformation and migration program(s)<br><br>• Lead large scale migration projects in concert with multiple stakeholders through the assessment, planning and<br>execution stages.<br>• Develop and conduct discovery, assessment and solution development workshops, often in collaboration with Client,<br>Internal resources (consulting, operations, product, and program management teams) to design solutions.<br>• Develop and document solutions that meet Client’s (technical and business) requirements and allow them to adapt to<br>changing industry needs with a focus on transformation and re-platform efforts<br>• Conduct solution development sessions and present technical solutions and business cases to a wide variety of<br>audiences.<br>• Gain executive (Client and Internal) buy-in for complex solutions<br>• Gain Client’s confidence as a trusted technical adviser by offering consultation and recommendations drawn from<br>insights, technology know-how and past experiences<br>• Align and partner with Product and Program Management to help drive appropriate product enhancements and<br>changes to technology roadmap<br>Requirements:<br>• Experience in planning and leading large-scale enterprise IT change management programs for transformation and<br>migration program(s)<br>• Experience designing, building, and operating global IT infrastructure

source_jobs.title: Director, Go To Market Strategy & Planning
Director, Mainframe Systems Programming
Expert DevOps Engineer-Public Cloud
source_jobs.description: <p>Key Responsibilities</p><ul><li>Act as the lead engineer on large or complex client deploy projects</li><li>Act as the lead engineer on product engineering projects to further develop our service</li><li>Provide AWS subject matter expertise advice and assistance to pre-sales architects</li><li>Installation, configuration, and ongoing management of O/S and AWS services.</li><li>Implementing and maintaining custom client machine images and centralised configuration management to enable quick repeatable builds and auto-scaling.</li><li>Maintaining high availability through proactive measures.</li><li>Troubleshooting and resolving complex technical issues.</li><li>Ensuring clients &amp; partners are updated on current status of work and issues.</li><li>Raise, investigate and resolve problems and known errors in line with the problem management process.</li><li>Ability and willingness to proactively improve ways of working, automation and processes via our continual improvement Kanban board.</li><li>Partake in an oncall rota to provide 24x7 4th line support for Ensono’s AWS clients.</li><li>Proactively keep up to date on AWS services and developments.</li><li>Act as the technical escalation point in the team for other members</li><li>Act as team leader in Manager’s absence</li></ul><p></p><p>Skills and Experience</p><ul><li>12+ years’ experience in supporting highly customer-focused mission critical environments (e.g. high profile websites or enterprise infrastructure) essential.</li><li>6+ years’ experience of engineering, architecting, or supporting AWS solutions.</li><li>Excellent O/S knowledge and experience in Linux or Windows with basic knowledge of the other. MCSE/RHCE or equivalent level of knowledge preferred.</li><li>Experience of implementing and supporting AWS based instances and services (e.g. EC2, S3, EBS, ELB, RDS, IAM, Route53, Cloudfront, Elasticache, WAF etc.).</li><li>Hold a number of current AWS Associate and Professional level Certifications ( Devops and Architect).</li><li>Hold at least one AWS Certified Speciality certification (e.g. Security or Networking)</li><li>Experience of building and maintaining scalable and auto-scaled environments using automation and configuration management tools (e.g. Cloudformation/Terraform and Ansible) beneficial or can be gained.</li><li>Scripting ability in one or more of Python, Powershell, Bash, Perl</li><li>Experience of using Git for version control</li><li>Experience of working with or supporting containerized environments (ECS/EKS/Kubernetes/Docker)</li><li>Experience of Jenkins or other CI/CD pipeline technology useful or can be gained.</li><li>Good knowledge of TCP/IP.</li><li>A degree in a computing-related discipline preferred or equivalent ability and knowledge.</li><li>Excellent written and verbal communication skills.</li><li>Experience working in an ITIL environment beneficial.</li><li>Desire to continually grow, develop and improve.</li><li>Must be independent, self-motivated, a self-starter and possess a good working attitude.</li><li>Client focused and results driven – a consistently high performer.</li><li>Able to make independent judgement and coordinate the group when required.</li><li>Able to implement supportable solutions and make the complex simple.</li><li>Able to perform as a role model and resident expert within the team.</li><li>Able to professionally represent the company at events (e.g. user groups, conferences).</li></ul>

Expert Systems Engineer, AIX
source_jobs.description: <p>At Ensono, our <b>Purpose is to be a relentless ally, disrupting the status quo and unleashing our clients to Do Great Things</b><i><b>!</b></i>&nbsp; We enable our clients to achieve key business outcomes that reshape how our world runs. As an expert technology adviser and managed service provider with cross-platform certifications, Ensono empowers our clients to keep up with continuous change and embrace innovation.</p><p>&nbsp;</p><p>We can <b>Do Great Things</b> because we have great Associates. The Ensono Core Values unify our diverse talents and are woven into how we do business. These five traits are the key to achieving our purpose:</p><p>&nbsp;</p><p>Honesty, Reliability, Curiosity, Collaboration, and Passion.</p><p><b>&nbsp;</b></p><p><b>About the role and what you'll be doing:&nbsp;</b></p><p>The AIX Expert System Engineer is a senior technical authority responsible for the architecture, engineering, optimization, and strategic evolution of IBM AIX and Power Systems environments. This role serves as the highest level of technical expertise, owning complex platform decisions, large‑scale migrations, performance engineering, automation, and resiliency design for business‑critical workloads.</p><p><b>&nbsp;</b></p><p><b>We want all new Associates to succeed in their roles at Ensono. That's why we've outlined the job requirements below. To be considered for this role, it's important that you meet all Required Qualifications. If you do not meet all of the Preferred Qualifications, we still encourage you to apply.</b>&nbsp;</p><p>&nbsp;</p><p><b>Key Responsibilities</b></p><p><b>Platform Architecture &amp; Engineering</b></p><ul><li>Act as technical owner and subject matter expert (SME) for IBM AIX and Power Systems platforms</li><li>Design, architect, and standardize enterprise‑scale AIX and pSeries environments</li><li>Define and maintain architecture standards, build patterns, and best practices</li><li>Provide expert guidance for capacity planning, scalability, and platform modernization</li><li>Review and approve complex designs related to compute, storage, virtualization, and<b> </b>networking</li></ul><p><b>IBM Power &amp; Virtualization Expertise</b></p><ul><li>Deep expertise in PowerVM, VIOS, and advanced AIX virtualization</li><li>Architect and manage:<ul><li>HMC environments (v9 &amp; v10)</li><li>Power8, Power9, and Power10 systems</li><li>DLPAR, LPM, NPIV</li><li>Virtual networking, virtual storage, SR‑IOV, vNIC adapters</li></ul></li><li>Lead VIOS architecture, build, upgrade, and high availability design</li><li>Perform pSeries hardware commissioning, refresh, and consolidation projects</li></ul><p><b>Lifecycle Management &amp; Migrations</b></p><ul><li>Lead AIX OS lifecycle management, including upgrades, patching, and kernel tuning</li><li>Architect and execute:<ul><li>AIX OS migrations (6.1 → 7.1 &nbsp;→ 7.2→ 7.3)</li><li>Hardware refresh and data center migrations</li><li>Storage and SAN migrations</li></ul></li><li>Own and optimize NIM (Network Installation Manager) design and usage</li><li>Design zero‑downtime or minimal‑impact migration strategies</li></ul><p><b>Performance, Reliability &amp; Resilience</b></p><ul><li>Perform advanced performance analysis, workload op

As an expert technology adviser and managed service provider with cross-platform certifications, Ensono empowers our clients to keep up with continuous change and embrace innovation.</span></span></span></p><p></p><p><span style="color:#4a4a4a"><span><span style="font-size:inherit">We can </span><b><span style="font-size:inherit">Do Great Things</span></b><span style="font-size:inherit"> because we have great Associates. The Ensono Core Values unify our diverse talents and are woven into how we do business. These five traits are the key to achieving our purpose:</span></span></span></p><p><span style="color:#4a4a4a"><span><span style="font-size:inherit"><br></span><b><span style="font-size:inherit">Honesty, Reliability, Curiosity, Collaboration, and Passion.</span></b></span></span></p><p></p><p><span style="color:#4a4a4a"><span><b><span style="font-size:inherit">About the role and what you'll be doing:</span></b></span></span></p><p><span style="color:#4a4a4a"><span><span style="font-size:inherit">The Senior IAM Engineer serves as a technical authority and trusted advisor, leading the design and delivery of Identity and Access Management (IAM) solutions in support of complex application migrations and enterprise security initiatives.</span></span></span></p><p></p><p><span style="color:#4a4a4a"><span><span style="font-size:inherit">Operating within client governance frameworks, this role partners closely with client stakeholders, architects, and security leadership to define IAM strategies, establish integration standards, and guide implementation outcomes. The Senior IAM Engineer is accountable for the technical quality, security posture, and scalability of IAM solutions and provides leadership across the IAM lifecycle—from design and implementation through migration, testing, and operational readiness.</span></span></span></p><p></p><p><span style="color:#4a4a4a"><span><span style="font-size:inherit">While this role remains hands-on, it extends beyond execution to include technical decision-making, architectural leadership, and mentorship, ensuring IAM solutions align with business objectives, regulatory requirements, and enterprise security standards.</span></span></span></p><p></p><p><span style="color:#4a4a4a"><span><b><span style="font-size:inherit">We want all new Associates to succeed in their roles at Ensono. That's why we've outlined the job requirements below. To be considered for this role, it's important that you meet all Required Qualifications. If you do not meet all of the Preferred Qualifications, we still encourage you to apply.</span></b></span></span></p><p></p><p><span style="color:#4a4a4a"><span><b><span style="font-size:inherit">KEY RESPONSIBILITIES</span></b></span></span></p
